nasb.text: As for the Levites, the heads of fathers’ households were registered in the days of Eliashib, Joiada, and Johanan and Jaddua; so were the priests in the reign of Darius the Persian.

esv.text: In the days of Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan, and Jaddua, the Levites were recorded as heads of fathers’ houses; so too were the priests in the reign of Darius the Persian.

cnv.text: 在以利亞實、耶何耶大、約哈難和押杜亞的日子，利未人的族長都登記了，同樣，波斯王大利烏在位時的祭司也都登記了。

ccb.text: 在以利亚实、耶何耶大、约哈难和押杜亚的时代，利未人的族长都列入名册；在波斯王大流士执政期间，祭司的族长也都列入名册。
